message:
fix(dolt): commit SQL transaction when DOLT_COMMIT finds nothing to commit

When all writes in a transaction target dolt_ignore'd tables (wisps,
wisp_labels, wisp_dependencies), DOLT_COMMIT returns "nothing to commit"
without ending the SQL transaction. The code swallowed this error and
returned nil, abandoning the uncommitted SQL transaction. The Go MySQL
driver then rolled it back on GC, silently discarding wisp writes.

Now explicitly calls sqlTx.Commit() in the "nothing to commit" case to
persist dolt_ignore'd table writes. Fixes 4 TestSpawn* failures that
have been broken since wisps were introduced.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
